chunks.text: Setting Your Account Password | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Setting Your Account Password First-time users and users who have forgotten their password may (re)set it using the self-service page, which

may (re)set it using the self-service page, which will email a link to set your password. Visit the self-serve page and click on Change your EECS Windows/LDAP Password . Click on the “Email” icon at the top left corner, which will prompt you to enter

he top left corner, which will prompt you to enter your EECS/LDAP login name (NOT Calnet) and your @EECS.BERKELEY.EDU email. This will send an email token to reset your password. You may also update your existing password using the self-serve page. P

our existing password using the self-serve page. Please enter your username, password, and new password in the appropriate fields. Feel free to contact help@eecs.berkeley.edu or if you encounter any issues. Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have
ssues. Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
